tweets.text: Oil prices and bond yields continue to rise, with oil above $85 and yields on 10- and 30-year Treasuries now at 4.63% & 5.14%, respectively. These trends will likely continue and are bearish for the economy and corporate earnings. How much longer can stock investors ignore this?
tweets.full_text: Oil prices and bond yields continue to rise, with oil above $85 and yields on 10- and 30-year Treasuries now at 4.63% & 5.14%, respectively. These trends will likely continue and are bearish for the economy and corporate earnings. How much longer can stock investors ignore this?

tweets.text: Everything is rallying today. Most likely, it's a Turnaround Tuesday head fake. The exception may be gold and silver, which are up about $70 and $2.50, respectively. While deteriorating fundamentals have been bearish for tech and Bitcoin, they've been bullish for precious metals.
tweets.full_text: Everything is rallying today. Most likely, it's a Turnaround Tuesday head fake. The exception may be gold and silver, which are up about $70 and $2.50, respectively. While deteriorating fundamentals have been bearish for tech and Bitcoin, they've been bullish for precious metals.
